approaches.title: Stack-based delimiter matching
approaches.summary: Uses a stack to track opening parentheses and validates each closing delimiter against the most recent unmatched opener. Revision 2 simplifies this by storing-­

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial stack implementation that stores opening delimiters and maps them to expected closing delimiters when matching.
Cleans up the same stack strategy by pushing expected closing delimiters directly and comparing each closing character,\
